text: ASP.NET Core Identity .NET 11 ships /refresh via MapIdentityApi. Tokens are opaque Data Protection blobs and the only kill switch is bumping the security stamp, which logs every device out. For real JWTs, per-device revocation, and rotation with family-based reuse detection, the post has the full pattern.

The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.
